components.desc: bash script agent.sh with CLI contract: 'plan <goal-file>' emits deterministic JSON plan to stdout; 'build <id>' writes component artifact files (e.g. out/<id>/main.sh + marker) deterministically; no network, no LLM; self-test: run both subcommands, verify plan is valid JSON via jq and build creates expected files

jq-based validator script gate.sh reading plan.json: asserts .components is non-empty array, every id matches ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$, every dep references a listed id; exit non-zero with message on violation; self-test: passes on valid fixture plan, fails on empty/bad-id/dangling-dep fixtures

jq script/target that transforms validated plan.json into components.mk: one pattern of targets per component with dep-ordered prerequisites mapping to per-component stamp files (build/<id>.done), parallel-safe; self-test: generate from fixture plan, grep expected rules and prerequisite lists

top-level Makefile: goal.md -> plan.json via agent adapter, plan.json gated by gate.sh, components.mk generated then re-included (make restart), default 'all' builds every component stamp via 'agent build <id>', .DELETE_ON_ERROR for resume, parallel-safe under -j; self-test: dry-run make -n on fixture shows correct rule chain

make target 'census' + census.sh: filesystem scan of expected artifacts from plan.json (stamps + component outputs), prints done/total count, exits 0 whether complete or not, non-zero only on census error (missing/unparsable plan.json); self-test: run against partial and complete fixture build dirs, verify counts and exit codes

make target 'graph' parsing components.mk (or plan.json) back into mermaid 'graph TD' edges 'dep --> id' printed to stdout, nodes with no deps still listed; self-test: generate from fixture, diff against expected mermaid text

non-interactive check.sh: creates trivial example goal.md, runs produced engine with stub agent end-to-end - plan gate passes, make -j builds components in dependency order (verify via stamp mtimes or build log ordering), census reports all done, graph target emits valid mermaid; exit non-zero on any failure
